acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Core daemon modules compile in new crate
- [ ] Compatibility re-exports keep downstream builds green
- [ ] No cyclic deps introduced
description:
**Problem**
Daemon ownership is split between old paths and target crate paths.
design: Relocate daemon modules into `beads-daemon` while keeping short-term compatibility re-exports in `beads-rs`.
title: Move daemon modules into beads-daemon with compatibility re-exports

description: Dot allocation performs sync write/fsync/rename of meta per allocation. Move OR-set counter durability into unified WAL index transaction metadata so hotpath allocation is memory-only.
title: P0: Remove per-dot synchronous meta durability from allocator hotpath

description:
**Problem**
`crates/beads-rs/tests/integration/core/{deps,identity}.rs` still sit under the assembly crate even though they are not pure `beads-core` ownership. `deps.rs` asserts `beads_git::wire::serialize_deps` behavior, and `identity.rs` mixes namespace validation with remote normalization and store-dir/lock behavior. Leaving them under `integration/core` keeps crate ownership muddy even after the pure core tests move.

**Where**
- `crates/beads-rs/tests/integration/core/deps.rs`
- `crates/beads-rs/tests/integration/core/identity.rs`
- supporting fixtures under `crates/beads-rs/tests/integration/fixtures/{identity,store_dir}.rs`
- likely owner crates: `beads-git`, `beads-bootstrap`, `beads-daemon`, or explicit assembly/e2e coverage with documented rationale

**Acceptance**
- [ ] `deps.rs` coverage moves to the crate that owns dep serialization behavior
- [ ] `identity.rs` coverage is either moved to the real owner crate(s) or deliberately retained as assembly coverage with documented rationale
- [ ] `beads-rs/tests/integration/core/` no longer contains mixed-owner tests
- [ ] relevant owner-crate tests pass

**Files**
- `crates/beads-rs/tests/integration/core/deps.rs`
- `crates/beads-rs/tests/integration/core/identity.rs`
- `crates/beads-rs/tests/integration/fixtures/identity.rs`
- `crates/beads-rs/tests/integration/fixtures/store_dir.rs
title: Re-home mixed-owner integration/core tests out of beads-rs
